_meta.description: APEX product catalogue — the grounding source of truth for eligibility checks (rule-based), Concierge-mode factual answers, and deep-link handoffs. NOT a financial ledger; purely product metadata.

depth_tiers.full: Proactively recommended by the Analyser. Has a signal targeting it, machine-checkable eligibility_rules, and verified facts.
depth_tiers.reference: Concierge/Guide only — answered accurately but never proactively recommended (no honest signal, or eligibility not machine-checkable). e.g. BHIM-UPI, Regular Savings, SBI General.

_meta.verified_field_note: verified=true means the numeric values were confirmed via research. verified=false means structurally reasonable placeholders — DO NOT present these numbers as fact without confirming against SBI's live product pages.
_meta.landing_url_note: landing_url is the real product/landing page for the handoff. Pre-fill is not achievable on SBI public pages (see specs/catalogue-finalisation.md), so APEX deep-links to the page and the customer completes it in OnlineSBI/YONO. placeholder:// = real URL not yet confirmed.

products.name: Insta Plus Savings Account
products.description: Fully digital savings account opened end-to-end through YONO with mandatory PAN + Aadhaar and a video KYC call. No branch visit required. New-to-bank resident individuals only.

key_facts.opening_channel: YONO, fully digital, video KYC, no branch visit

products.primary_use: onboarding / acquisition default for new customers

products.name: Regular Savings Bank Account
products.verification_source: interest rate: sbi.bank.in/web/interest-rates/savings-bank-deposits (fetched 2026-06-20); min-balance waiver / chequebook not yet primary-confirmed
products.description: Standard SBI savings account with chequebook, debit card, and full YONO/net-banking access. No minimum balance requirement (AMB penalty waived).

key_facts.chequebook: First 10 cheque leaves free per financial year (not yet primary-confirmed)

products.primary_use: general savings account for customers wanting chequebook/full features

products.name: Fixed Deposit (Regular)
products.description: Lump-sum term deposit at a fixed interest rate. Flexible tenure; loan/overdraft against FD available (90% for STDR, 75% for TDR).

key_facts.min_amount: Rs 1,000 minimum, multiples of Rs 100 thereafter
key_facts.premature_withdrawal: Penalty waived up to Rs 5 lakh; 0.5% on applicable rate above Rs 5 lakh

products.primary_use: idle balance — conservative option

products.name: Multi Option Deposit Scheme (MOD) / Auto Sweep
products.verification_source: sbi.bank.in/web/personal-banking/investments-deposits/deposits/mod (primary source, fetched directly, last updated by SBI 01-12-2025)
products.description: Links a savings account to an FD-like sweep. Balance above a threshold auto-sweeps into a higher-interest deposit; reverse-sweeps back when the savings balance falls short. This is the real SBI product underlying APEX's Level 3 standing-rule example.

key_facts.sweep_threshold: Sweeps when savings balance exceeds Rs 50,000
key_facts.standalone_mod: Can be opened irrespective of threshold/resultant balance — no separate minimum confirmed by primary source
key_facts.reverse_sweep: Auto-reverses in Rs 5,000 units; full reversal once TDR hits Rs 15,000; LIFO default, FIFO optional
key_facts.interest: Quarterly compounding; senior citizens get an additional rate; super seniors do not

products.primary_use: idle balance sitting well above Rs 50,000 — Level 3 standing rule

products.name: Recurring Deposit
products.description: Fixed monthly contributions over a set tenure earning FD-equivalent interest. Good for disciplined regular saving.

key_facts.min_monthly_amount: Rs 100 per month, multiples of Rs 10 thereafter

products.primary_use: regular monthly saving habit

products.name: Tax Saver Fixed Deposit
products.description: 5-year lock-in FD eligible for tax deduction up to Rs 1.5 lakh under Section 80C. Cannot be encashed before 5 years (except on death) and no loan/overdraft is allowed against it.

key_facts.tax_benefit: Up to Rs 1.5 lakh deduction under Section 80C
key_facts.min_amount: Rs 1,000 (multiples of Rs 100); senior citizens Rs 10,000 minimum
key_facts.lock_in: 5 years; no premature encashment except on death of depositor
key_facts.loan_against: Not allowed (no OD on Tax Saver FD)

products.primary_use: tax-saving need near financial year end

products.name: JanNivesh SIP
products.verification_source: SBI Mutual Fund JanNivesh 250 SIP — confirmed via multiple sources 2026-06-20 (Rs 250 min; daily/weekly/monthly; SBI Balanced Advantage Fund). Not yet fetched from sbimf.com primary page.
products.description: Micro-SIP starting at Rs 250, designed for first-time investors and small savers. Currently on SBI Balanced Advantage Fund. Zero-folio instant start through YONO.

key_facts.fund: SBI Balanced Advantage Fund (dynamic equity/debt mix)

products.primary_use: idle balance — first-time / small investor

products.name: SBI Mutual Fund (SIP / Lumpsum)
products.verification_source: SBI Mutual Fund (sbimf.com) — min SIP varies by scheme (~Rs 500 typical); not yet fetched from primary scheme pages 2026-06-20
products.description: Over 40 mutual fund schemes (equity, hybrid, debt, solution-oriented), investable via lumpsum or SIP through YONO with zero-folio instant start.

key_facts.typical_min_sip: Rs 500 for most schemes (varies by scheme)

products.primary_use: broader investing once customer is past first SIP

products.name: PPF Account
products.description: Public Provident Fund — long-term, government-backed tax-advantaged savings with a 15-year term, extendable in 5-year blocks. Autopay via standing instruction available through YONO.

key_facts.min_annual: Rs 500 per year, multiples of Rs 50
key_facts.interest_rate_pa: 7.10% p.a. (w.e.f. 01.04.2020), compounded annually; government reviews quarterly
key_facts.term: 15 years from end of FY of opening; extendable in 5-year blocks, unlimited

products.primary_use: long-term tax-advantaged saving

products.name: National Pension System (NPS)
products.description: Government retirement savings scheme with market-linked returns. Offers an additional Rs 50,000 tax deduction under Section 80CCD(1B), over and above the Rs 1.5 lakh 80C ceiling.

key_facts.min_contribution: Rs 1,000 per year minimum (Rs 500 minimum per contribution)
key_facts.tax_benefit_80ccd_1b: Additional Rs 50,000 deduction over and above the Rs 1.5 lakh 80C/80CCE limit
key_facts.tax_benefit_80cce: Within the overall Rs 1.5 lakh limit (10% of Basic + DA)

products.primary_use: tax-saving — additional Rs 50k under 80CCD(1B) for customers who have maxed 80C

products.name: SBI Life - eShield Insta
products.description: Digital term insurance with a simple 3-step process. Plan A: pure term. Plan B: term with return of premium. No medicals for cover up to Rs 75 lakh for ages up to 40 — the low-friction nature makes it suitable for sensitive-moment scenarios.

key_facts.medical_test: No medicals for cover up to Rs 75 lakh for ages up to 40 (subject to no adverse declaration)
key_facts.process: Simple digital process via YONO / SBI Life
key_facts.plan_b: Term with Return of Premium — 100% of premiums returned on survival to maturity

products.primary_use: life-event / protection signal — handled with ethical restraint

products.name: SBI General Insurance (Health / Motor / Home)
products.description: Non-life insurance covering health, motor, and home. Tier A by design (asset-purchase insight nudge) but depth stays reference — eligibility varies too much by product line for a single machine-checkable rule.

key_facts.health: Health Alpha, Super Health, Arogya Top-up, Super Top-Up; sum insured up to Rs 2 crore
key_facts.motor: Private Car Package, Two Wheeler insurance
key_facts.home: Bharat Griha Raksha, Griha Raksha Plus, Simple Home Insurance

products.primary_use: health-scare or asset-purchase signals

products.name: Pre-Approved Personal Loan (PAPL)
products.description: Instant pre-approved personal loan for selected customers, disbursed in minutes via a paperless YONO flow. Eligibility is determined by SBI's own pre-qualification, not by APEX.

eligibility_rules.eligibility_check: SMS 'PAPL <last 4 digits of account>' to 567676, or PAPL banner in YONO
eligibility_rules.note: PAPL is an offer to selected customers — APEX reads the offer flag, never determines it

key_facts.processing_fee: Nil to maximum Rs 10,000 + GST, by variant
key_facts.eligibility_channels: SMS / email / in-app / Internet Banking offer section

products.primary_use: cash-flow stress signal where customer already holds a PAPL offer

products.name: Loan Against Fixed Deposit
products.description: Overdraft against an existing FD without premature closure — min Rs 5,000, up to 90% of FD value, at ~1% above the FD rate on daily reducing balance. Zero processing fee, no prepayment penalty.

key_facts.rate: ~1% above applicable FD rate, daily reducing balance
key_facts.facility: Overdraft — no premature closure of FD

products.primary_use: liquidity need when customer holds an FD — alternative to premature withdrawal

products.name: Home Loan
products.description: Housing loan for purchase/construction. Long tenure, property as collateral. Signal targets sustained renters (owns_property = false); APEX pre-screens on income, SBI does final underwriting/LTV.

eligibility_rules.note: min_monthly_income is an APEX pre-screen heuristic, not an SBI rule; SBI determines final eligibility and LTV

products.primary_use: major life-transition signal (e.g. sustained rent payments)

products.name: Personal Loan
products.description: Unsecured personal loan (incl. Xpress Credit) for salaried customers, with a real-time end-to-end digital variant via YONO. The cash-need route when no PAPL offer exists.

eligibility_rules.note: min_monthly_income is an APEX pre-screen heuristic; SBI does final credit assessment

key_facts.note: Distinct from PAPL — this is the non-pre-approved route

products.primary_use: cash need without a pre-approved offer

products.name: Education Loan
products.description: Loan for higher education, domestic or overseas. Signal targets customers with a tuition-payment pattern and dependents; admission proof required at application.

eligibility_rules.note: APEX pre-screens on dependents + tuition pattern; admission/co-applicant confirmed by SBI

products.primary_use: child reaching college age / tuition payment signal

products.name: Auto Loan
products.description: Vehicle purchase loan. Triggered by a large vehicle-category purchase signal; APEX pre-screens on income, SBI does final underwriting.

eligibility_rules.note: min_monthly_income is an APEX pre-screen heuristic; SBI determines final eligibility

products.primary_use: vehicle-purchase intent signal

products.name: Gold Loan
products.description: Loan against gold collateral. Triggered by a short-term liquidity-gap pattern for customers who hold gold (owns_gold).
products.primary_use: short-term liquidity / cash-flow gap

products.name: Loan Against Mutual Funds
products.description: Overdraft/loan against mutual fund holdings as collateral (loan against securities). Routed from the cash-flow-stress signal when the customer holds MF units.
products.primary_use: liquidity need for customers holding MF investments

products.name: e-PAY / Bharat Bill Payment System (AutoPay)
products.description: Bill payment service with an AutoPay feature: customer sets an upper limit, and bills within that limit are paid automatically when due. Handles variable bills (electricity, water) better than a fixed standing instruction. Editable/cancellable per biller.

key_facts.mechanism: Set an upper limit; bills within it auto-pay when due, bills above the limit are not processed
key_facts.routing: YONO Pay > BBPS redirects to SBI Unipay (Customer + Biller Operating Unit under BBPS)

products.primary_use: manual recurring bill payment detected — autopay nudge

products.name: Standing Instruction
products.verification_source: SBI Standing Instruction — YONO/OnlineSBI service; feature confirmed 2026-06-20 (no standalone public product page)
products.description: Fixed-amount recurring transfer to a beneficiary at set intervals (e.g. rent, PPF contribution). Best for fixed amounts, unlike AutoPay which suits variable bills.
products.primary_use: Concierge — fixed recurring transfer setup (no proactive signal)

products.name: BHIM SBI Pay (UPI)
products.description: UPI payments through SBI. The all-new YONO also lets other-bank customers use it for UPI.

key_facts.note: UPI available within YONO; cross-bank UPI supported since 2023

products.primary_use: payments adoption — customer transacting via competitor UPI apps

products.name: YONO Cash (Cardless ATM Withdrawal)
products.description: Withdraw cash from SBI ATMs / merchant POS without a physical card, using a reference number and dynamic PIN generated in YONO.

key_facts.mechanism: Generate reference number + dynamic PIN in YONO, withdraw cardless

products.primary_use: feature-adoption / mobile-banking engagement

products.name: Salary Package Account (SBI Corporate Salary Package)
products.description: Zero-balance salary account with complimentary accident insurance and tiered benefits for customers receiving regular salary credits. APEX's upgrade target when a salary-credit pattern lands in a plain savings account.

eligibility_rules.conversion: Apply at home branch with proof of salary/employment to convert an existing savings account

key_facts.tiers: Gold, Diamond, Platinum, Rhodium — upgradeable on proof of salary increase or rank elevation
key_facts.complimentary_cover: Personal Accident + Air Accident cover, Rs 30 lakh to Rs 100 lakh by tier; additional RuPay debit-card cover up to Rs 10 lakh
key_facts.reversion: Reverts to a normal savings account if salary is not credited for more than 3 consecutive months

products.primary_use: regular salary credits detected in a plain savings account — upgrade

products.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
products.verification_source: jansuraksha.gov.in (PMJJBY scheme rules) + multiple sources, fetched 2026-06-20
products.description: Government-backed term life cover available through an SBI savings account via annual auto-debit. Ultra-low-cost mass-market protection — aligns directly with the financial-inclusion thesis.

key_facts.cover: Rs 2 lakh life cover on death due to any cause
key_facts.entry_age: 18 to 50 years; cover continues to age 55 if premium paid annually

products.primary_use: protection gap — income customer with no life cover

products.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
products.verification_source: jansuraksha.gov.in (PMSBY scheme rules) + multiple sources, fetched 2026-06-20
products.description: Government-backed accidental death and disability cover via SBI savings-account auto-debit. Companion to PMJJBY for low-cost inclusion protection.

key_facts.cover: Rs 2 lakh accidental death / permanent total disability (Rs 1 lakh partial disability)

products.primary_use: protection gap — income customer with no accident cover

products.name: SBI Credit Card (Pre-Approved)
products.verification_source: sbicard.com (SimplySAVE / SimplyCLICK product pages + first-year-free pre-approved SimplySAVE UPI T&C), fetched 2026-06-20
products.description: Pre-approved credit card offered to selected customers from SBI's own pre-qualification. APEX reads the pre-approved offer flag and surfaces it on a healthy-spend pattern — it never determines creditworthiness, mirroring the PAPL handling.

eligibility_rules.note: Pre-approved offer is determined by SBI, not APEX — APEX reads the has_card_offer flag, never sets it

key_facts.common_variants: SimplySAVE (10x rewards on dining/groceries, 0% fuel surcharge), SimplyCLICK (10x online rewards on partner brands)
key_facts.fees_example: SimplySAVE: Rs 499 annual + Rs 499 renewal; renewal fee reversed on spends of Rs 1,00,000+ in the prior year
key_facts.preapproved_offer: Pre-approved SimplySAVE UPI variant available with first-year-free for selected customers

products.primary_use: pre-approved card offer + active spend pattern
